---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

Various questions:



# Nomological components vs canonical components

Nomological component definition:


Canonical component definition:


What parts of the algorithm show whether nomological or canonical components are assumed?


- I suspect that the current IGSCA implementation uses nomological components and not canonical, but it doesn't explain why the current IGSCA implementation differs from both the current GSCA/GSCA_M implementations
